query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A close-up view of turbulent ocean water in motion, with swirling white foam mixing against darker water beneath, capturing the dynamic interaction of waves and surf from directly above.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred, detail-obscured overhead capture of turbulent ocean water where the foam and waves dissolve into soft, smeared streaks of pale blue and gray, rendering the water's surface and textures into an indistinct, dreamlike abstraction with no resolvable fine detail.
